description_long: This is an adult pedestrian figure with a medium build, standing with arms extended horizontally. The individual is dressed in a short-sleeve collared shirt layered under a sleeveless vest, paired with knee-length shorts and lace-up shoes. The figure's hair is styled in a ponytail, and facial features are clearly defined, giving a lifelike appearance. The clothing appears casual and suitable for everyday urban environments, with the vest providing a textured contrast to the smoother shirt and shorts. The shoes are practical and flat-soled, appropriate for walking on city streets or sidewalks. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall posture is upright and neutral.
description: An adult pedestrian in casual attire, standing upright with arms outstretched, wearing a collared shirt, vest, shorts, and lace-up shoes, with hair in a ponytail.
description_view_0: Front view shows the facial features, collared shirt under a vest, shorts, and lace-up shoes, with arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the ponytail hairstyle, the profile of the face, and the layered clothing, with the arm and leg contours visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the vest, the ponytail, and the back of the shorts and shoes, with both arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, ponytail, and the layered clothing from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeve collared shirt under a sleeveless vest, knee-length shorts, and casual lace-up shoes
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
